---
title: "run_pipeline"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-26"
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(TTR)
library(ggpmisc)

# -----------------------------
# Parameters
# -----------------------------

sma_window <- 31          # about 0.5 s at 62 Hz
bout_gap_threshold <- 0.5 # split bouts if gap >= 0.5 s

accel_general_rejection <- 1.0   # m/s^2
gyro_general_rejection  <- 0.32  # rad/s

gravity_constant <- 9.80665
deg_to_rad <- pi / 180

# -----------------------------
# Helper functions
# -----------------------------

compute_magnitude <- function(df, sensor = c("accel", "gyro")) {
  sensor <- match.arg(sensor)

  time <- df$`Timestamp (microseconds)` / 1e6

  if (sensor == "accel") {
    x <- df$`Accel X (g)` * gravity_constant
    y <- df$`Accel Y (g)` * gravity_constant
    z <- df$`Accel Z (g)` * gravity_constant
  } else {
    x <- df$`Gyro X (°/s)` * deg_to_rad
    y <- df$`Gyro Y (°/s)` * deg_to_rad
    z <- df$`Gyro Z (°/s)` * deg_to_rad
  }

  df %>%
    mutate(
      times = time - min(time),
      mag = sqrt(x^2 + y^2 + z^2),
      id = row_number()
    )
}

trim_after_sync_peak <- function(df, t1, t2) {
  tap_window <- df %>%
    filter(times >= t1, times <= t2)

  peak_row <- tap_window$id[which.max(tap_window$mag)]

  df %>%
    filter(id > peak_row) %>%
    mutate(times = times - min(times))
}

trim_session <- function(df, start_time, end_time) {
  df %>%
    filter(times >= start_time, times <= end_time) %>%
    mutate(
      mag_d = mag - median(mag, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
}

estimate_accel_threshold <- function(df) {
  rectified <- abs(df$mag_d)
  smoothed <- TTR::SMA(rectified, n = sma_window)

  peak_index <- ggpmisc:::find_peaks(smoothed)
  peak_values <- smoothed[peak_index]

  peak_values <- peak_values[peak_values >= accel_general_rejection]

  threshold <- mean(peak_values, na.rm = TRUE) -
    0.5 * sd(peak_values, na.rm = TRUE)

  return(threshold)
}

estimate_gyro_threshold <- function(df) {
  rectified <- abs(df$mag_d)
  smoothed <- TTR::SMA(rectified, n = sma_window)

  peak_index <- ggpmisc:::find_peaks(smoothed)
  peak_values <- smoothed[peak_index]

  peak_values <- peak_values[peak_values >= gyro_general_rejection]

  threshold <- mean(peak_values, na.rm = TRUE) -
    0.5 * sd(peak_values, na.rm = TRUE)

  return(threshold)
}

detect_candidate_points <- function(accel_df, gyro_df) {
  accel_threshold <- estimate_accel_threshold(accel_df)
  gyro_threshold <- estimate_gyro_threshold(gyro_df)

  accel_detected <- accel_df %>%
    mutate(
      times_round = round(times, 2),
      accel_above = mag_d > accel_threshold | mag_d < -accel_threshold
    ) %>%
    filter(accel_above) %>%
    select(times_round)

  gyro_detected <- gyro_df %>%
    mutate(
      times_round = round(times, 2),
      gyro_above = mag_d > gyro_threshold | mag_d < -gyro_threshold
    ) %>%
    filter(gyro_above) %>%
    select(times_round)

  overlap <- inner_join(accel_detected, gyro_detected, by = "times_round") %>%
    distinct(times_round) %>%
    arrange(times_round)

  list(
    overlap = overlap,
    accel_threshold = accel_threshold,
    gyro_threshold = gyro_threshold
  )
}

extract_bouts <- function(overlap_df) {
  if (nrow(overlap_df) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(
      start_time = numeric(),
      end_time = numeric(),
      duration = numeric()
    ))
  }

  bouts <- as.data.table(overlap_df)
  setnames(bouts, "times_round", "times")

  bouts[, time_previous := shift(times)]
  bouts[, gap := times - time_previous]
  bouts[is.na(gap), gap := Inf]

  bouts[, bout_id := cumsum(gap >= bout_gap_threshold)]

  bout_summary <- bouts[, .(
    start_time = min(times),
    end_time = max(times),
    duration = max(times) - min(times)
  ), by = bout_id]

  as.data.frame(bout_summary)
}

summarize_bouts <- function(bouts, session_duration) {
  data.frame(
    n_bouts = nrow(bouts),
    mean_duration = mean(bouts$duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_duration = sd(bouts$duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_movement_time = sum(bouts$duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    movement_time_proportion = sum(bouts$duration, na.rm = TRUE) / session_duration
  )
}
```
